title: Theo's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Theo feels worried about bedtime until he discovers that the gentle stars in the sky can help him feel calm and sleepy. Through three peaceful chapters, Theo learns to embrace his nighttime feelings and drift off to dreamland.

pages.text: Theo sits on his bed in his soft pajamas. The moon peeks through his window, but Theo's eyes feel so wide awake! His tummy has little butterflies dancing inside.

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes sitting on a cozy bed wearing blue pajamas, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo sitting on his bed in pajamas looking wide awake

pages.text: "I don't feel sleepy yet," Theo whispers to his teddy bear. "What if I can't fall asleep?" The worried feeling makes his heart beat a little faster.

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes holding a teddy bear close to his chest, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo whispering to his teddy bear with a worried expression

pages.text: Suddenly, gentle stars begin to twinkle outside Theo's window. They seem to wink at him with their soft, golden light. One star floats closer and whispers, "We're here to help you feel calm."

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes looking out his bedroom window at twinkling stars, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo looking at magical stars floating outside his window

pages.text: The star shows Theo how to breathe slowly. "In... and out," it says gently. Theo feels his worried butterflies starting to settle down. His shoulders feel less tight.

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes taking deep breaths with a glowing star nearby, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo breathing deeply with a magical star guiding him

pages.text: More stars gather around Theo's room, creating a soft, dreamy light. They hum a quiet lullaby that makes Theo's eyelids feel heavy and warm.

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes in his bedroom surrounded by gentle floating stars, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo's room filled with gentle glowing stars creating a peaceful atmosphere

pages.text: "Thank you, stars," Theo yawns. His worried feelings have melted away like snow. He snuggles under his cozy blanket, feeling safe and sleepy at last.

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peacefully tucked into bed with a content smile, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully in his bed with stars watching over him

pages.text: The stars twinkle softly as Theo drifts off to dreamland. His heart feels calm and happy. Sweet dreams, Theo!

illustration.description: A boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes fast asleep with dream clouds floating above, soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping soundly with magical dream clouds above him

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How did Theo feel at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Theo felt wide awake and had worried butterflies in his tummy about falling asleep.

questions.question: Who helped Theo feel better?
questions.explanation: The twinkling stars came to help Theo feel calm and ready for sleep.

questions.question: What did the star teach Theo to do?
questions.explanation: The star showed Theo how to breathe slowly to help him feel calm.

questions.question: How did Theo feel at the end?
questions.explanation: By the end, Theo felt calm and happy as he drifted off to sleep.
